# RateMyProfessors API Client (TypeScript)

[![npm](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/ratemyprofessors-client?color=10b981&cacheSeconds=300)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ratemyprofessors-client) [![downloads](https://img.shields.io/npm/dt/ratemyprofessors-client?cacheSeconds=300)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ratemyprofessors-client) [![docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/docs-website-10b981?cacheSeconds=300)](https://amaanjaved1.github.io/rate-my-professors-client-ts/)

A typed, retrying, rate-limited **unofficial** client for [RateMyProfessors](https://www.ratemyprofessors.com).

> **Looking for Python?** Check out the [Python version](https://github.com/amaanjaved1/Rate-My-Professors-API-Client).

## Requirements

- **Node.js 18** or later
- Works in both TypeScript and JavaScript projects (types included)

## Installation

```bash
npm install ratemyprofessors-client
```

## Available Functions

Create a client and call any of these methods. See the [full docs](https://amaanjaved1.github.io/rate-my-professors-client-ts/) for parameters, return types, and examples.

```typescript
import { RMPClient } from "ratemyprofessors-client";
const client = new RMPClient();
```

**Schools**

- `searchSchools(query)` ‚Äî Search schools by name. Returns paginated results.
- `getSchool(schoolId)` ‚Äî Get a single school by its numeric ID.
- `getCompareSchools(schoolId1, schoolId2)` ‚Äî Fetch two schools side by side.
- `getSchoolRatingsPage(schoolId)` ‚Äî Get one page of school ratings (cached after first fetch).
- `iterSchoolRatings(schoolId)` ‚Äî Async iterator over all ratings for a school.

**Professors**

- `searchProfessors(query)` ‚Äî Search professors by name. Returns paginated results.
- `listProfessorsForSchool(schoolId)` ‚Äî List professors at a given school.
- `iterProfessorsForSchool(schoolId)` ‚Äî Async iterator over all professors at a school.
- `getProfessor(professorId)` ‚Äî Get a single professor by their numeric ID.
- `getProfessorRatingsPage(professorId)` ‚Äî Get one page of professor ratings (cached after first fetch).
- `iterProfessorRatings(professorId)` ‚Äî Async iterator over all ratings for a professor.

**Low-level**

- `rawQuery(payload)` ‚Äî Send a raw GraphQL payload to the RMP endpoint.

**Lifecycle**

- `close()` ‚Äî Close the client, abort in-flight requests, and clear caches.

## Errors and What They Mean

All errors extend `RMPError`. Catch and narrow with `instanceof`:

- **`HttpError`** ‚Äî The server returned a non-2xx status code (e.g. 404, 500).
- **`ParsingError`** ‚Äî The response couldn't be parsed (e.g. professor/school not found).
- **`RateLimitError`** ‚Äî The client's local rate limiter blocked the request.
- **`RetryError`** ‚Äî The request failed after all retry attempts. Contains the last underlying error.
- **`RMPAPIError`** ‚Äî The GraphQL API returned an `errors` array in the response.
- **`ConfigurationError`** ‚Äî Invalid client configuration (e.g. missing URL).

```typescript
import { RMPClient, HttpError, ParsingError } from "ratemyprofessors-client";

try {
  const prof = await client.getProfessor(id);
} catch (e) {
  if (e instanceof ParsingError) console.error("Not found:", e.message);
  else if (e instanceof HttpError) console.error("HTTP", e.status_code);
  else throw e;
}
```

## Types

All methods return typed data. Import any of these interfaces:

```typescript
import type {
  School,
  Professor,
  Rating,
  SchoolRating,
  ProfessorSearchResult,
  SchoolSearchResult,
  ProfessorRatingsPage,
  SchoolRatingsPage,
  CompareSchoolsResult,
} from "ratemyprofessors-client";
```

- **`School`** ‚Äî ID, name, location, overall quality, category ratings (reputation, safety, etc.)
- **`Professor`** ‚Äî ID, name, department, school, overall rating, difficulty, percent take again
- **`Rating`** ‚Äî Date, comment, quality, difficulty, tags, course, thumbs up/down
- **`SchoolRating`** ‚Äî Date, comment, overall score, category ratings, thumbs up/down
- **`ProfessorSearchResult`** / **`SchoolSearchResult`** ‚Äî Paginated list with `has_next_page` and `next_cursor`
- **`ProfessorRatingsPage`** / **`SchoolRatingsPage`** ‚Äî One page of ratings with cursor pagination
- **`CompareSchoolsResult`** ‚Äî A pair of schools

## Extras

Optional helpers for data pipelines are available under the `extras` subpath:

```typescript
import {
  normalizeComment,
  isValidComment,
  cleanCourseLabel,
  buildCourseMapping,
  analyzeSentiment,
} from "ratemyprofessors-client/extras";
```

- `normalizeComment(text, options?)` ‚Äî Normalize text for deduplication (trim, strip HTML, lowercase, collapse whitespace; optionally strip punctuation)
- `isValidComment(text, minLen?)` ‚Äî Validate a comment and return `{ valid, issues }` with diagnostics (empty, too short, all caps, excessive repeats, no alpha)
- `cleanCourseLabel(raw)` ‚Äî Clean scraped course labels (remove counts, normalize whitespace)
- `buildCourseMapping(scraped, valid)` ‚Äî Map scraped labels to known course codes
- `analyzeSentiment(text)` ‚Äî Analyze comment sentiment using the AFINN-165 lexicon (returns score, comparative, and label)
